title: KonoSuba Custom GUI Pack
body:
**![](https://i.imgur.com/FJWxF6j.png)**

**Introduction:**
This GUI-only resource pack is themed around "KonoSuba." It can be combined with other resource packs by placing it on top of your current one. I've updated various UI elements, including the hot bar, and added different images to each container. The chosen color palette is purple and orange, but I’m open to suggestions for other color schemes like pink and white.

**Community Engagement:**
Feel free to leave comments or report any bugs so I can make improvements.

**Feature Highlights:**
- **Hud:** ![Hud](https://i.imgur.com/RqXeIti.png)
- **Settings:** ![Settings](https://i.imgur.com/ecp2sDI.png)
- **Creative Menu:** ![Creative Menu](https://i.imgur.com/XZ4mJhp.png)
- **Inventory:** ![Inventory](https://i.imgur.com/INaWgAC.png)
- **Anvil:** ![Anvil](https://i.imgur.com/ewOX93N.png)
- **Crafting Table:** ![Crafting Table](https://i.imgur.com/1IWjBQ7.png)
- **Furnace:** ![Furnace](https://i.imgur.com/QYQDKay.png)
- **Shulker Box:** ![Shulker Box](https://i.imgur.com/jf1fhJz.png)
- **Loom:** ![Loom](https://i.imgur.com/T3WdMjn.png)
- **Brewing Stand:** ![Brewing Stand](https://i.imgur.com/2gA0er4.png)
- **Cartography Table:** ![Cartography Table](https://i.imgur.com/3Ho0BSV.png)
- **Villager Trading Menu:** ![Villager Trading Menu](https://i.imgur.com/YE1Ypkr.png)

**Additional Resources:**
- Explore more packs on [ListarMC](https://listarmc.com/)
- Join our [Discord server](https://discord.gg/RvScgzj3Ph) for suggestions, voting on future packs, and anime discussions

**Thank you for your support! ❤️**
